title: Savory Light Quick Fix Peruvian Orange Stir-fry
description: This savory and light vegetarian-friendly dish combines the zing of fresh orange with a warming blend of spices to create a quick-fix Peruvian delicacy, perfect for those seeking an easy-to-make yet impressive meal.

ingredients.name: Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

instructions: Place the tofu in the sous-vide bag with the orange zest, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Seal and cook for at least 3 hours or up to overnight.
Remove from sous-vide and let it cool slightly before slicing into cubes.
In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add tofu cubes to the skillet. Stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes or until golden brown on all sides.
Garnish with extra orange zest if desired before serving.
